hotspot.title: LOL Board
hotspot.description: displays all the unforgettable happy memories & experience from each of the kool members

hotspot.title: Corporate achievement
hotspot.description:
Young Industrialist Award by Mr. Kenny Kong, Co-Founder of Kool
Hong Kong Most Outstanding Leader Award
Hong Kong Key Opinion Leader (KOL)
Yellow Pages Award, The Best Creative Kitchenware
Hong Kong Top Brand
D-Mark: design mark
Q-mark Product Scheme

hotspot.title: Design Awards
hotspot.description:
Red Dot Design Award (Germany)
Good Design Award (Japan)
IDA Design Awards (U.S.)
Architecture Masterprize (U.S.)
Golden Pin Design Award (Taiwan)

hotspot.title: Dream Broad
hotspot.description: This is where we aim high and dream big. Let us all have a race and act quick!

hotspot.title: Professional Institute Certificates
hotspot.description:
Federation of Hong Kong Industries
Hong Kong Federation of Restaurants and Related Trades

hotspot.title: throwback
hotspot.description: Look how we have evolved from day one. A single sheet of rendering image showing our very first utensil from top left, going all the way to today’s eye-catching catalogue consisting of hundreds of own-designed awarded items.

hotspot.title: The creative council
hotspot.description: Are you creative enough to become one of us?

hotspot.title: Dripping
hotspot.description: A cup of coffee or tea can freshen up your day, with all the innovative self-made dripping & brewing tools we created, you can start your day in an easy way! www.koolb2b.com.hk

hotspot.title: Drinking
hotspot.description: Ever wonder what is missing at home? Some creative wine accessories / barware / party items are the answers. Treat yourself better with some classy and fun party nights! www.koolb2b.com.hk

hotspot.title: Cooking
hotspot.description: Who needs a boring cooking tutorial? Anyone can become head chef with our multi-function cooking tools. Let’s bring more fun to food preparation! www.koolb2b.com.hk

hotspot.title: Made in Vietnam
hotspot.description: Passing down the extensive production experience and knowhow from our China plants, as an alternative, we also offer a made-in-Vietnam option. www.koolb2b.com.hk

hotspot.title: Baking
hotspot.description: Families, kids, friends - spend some quality time with your loved ones, let’s start the fun baking project! www.koolb2b.com.hk

hotspot.title: Kool corner
hotspot.description: A combination of aesthetic designed, quality and innovative. We proudly introducing our own branded collection - kool. www.kool.com.hk

hotspot.title: Showroom of inventions
hotspot.description: Welcome! Take a step forward and explore the innovative inventions of ours.

hotspot.title: Bianco di puro
hotspot.description: European top-notch brand bianco di puro is a company specializing in the high-grade kitchen appliances. VEDEC HK Limited holds sales and sole distribution rights for handling Hong Kong, China, Singapore, Indonesia, and Malaysia commercial markets since 2017 and expands business rapidly into the global F&B market. www.vedec.com.hk

hotspot.title: One Copenhagen
hotspot.description: The conceptual idea of OneCopenhagen was spawned in the wake of a successful crowdfunding campaign, a close to unhealthy ambition to challenge kitchen tools of today and probably a to-generous part of Carlsbergs. https://www.one-copenhagen.com/

hotspot.title: Grayl
hotspot.description: Purification and filtration in [ONE PRESS]. GRAYL’s ingenious design revolutionizes how we drink water. Fill. Press. Drink.™ https://www.grayl.com/

hotspot.title: MCP
hotspot.description: Model Citizen Pet is a new pet supply and gadgetry brand, one that is focused on bringing innovative products to pet owners and animal lovers. https://modelcitizenpet.com/

hotspot.title: The F shadow
hotspot.description:
Established for 16 years = <font color="#00f3ff">2x the duration to build the Colosseum in Rome (let’s build a Great Kool Empire)</font>
Shipped out 3,200 containers = <font color="#00f3ff">10x the height of world’s tallest building, Burj Khalifa (we should be in the Guinness Record now)</font>
Developed 5,000 SKUs = <font color="#00f3ff">various kind of living creature, excluding insects, in Amazon (we meant the rainforest….)</font>
Reciprocated 15,000,000 pcs utensil = <font color="#00f3ff">1/4 length of the Great Wall of China (we will build the Great Utensil Wall in this Dynasty of Kool)</font>
Presented 20,000,000 pcs tumbler = <font color="#00f3ff">20,547 years of water intake for you (maybe in the future we can live that long)</font>
And…. uncountable work and dreams still go on = <font color="#00f3ff">potential power of Kool (damn right we have infinite strength)</font>

hotspot.title: Inspiration bar
hotspot.description: Welcome to our inspiration bar! Where we generate great ideas for our creative products, also an area where we conduct product testing and development!

hotspot.title: The F wall
hotspot.description:
<font color="#00f3ff">Established for 16 years</font> = 2x the duration to build the Colosseum in Rome (let’s build a Great Kool Empire)
<font color="#00f3ff">Shipped out 3,200 containers</font> = 10x the height of world’s tallest building, Burj Khalifa (we should be in the Guinness Record now)
<font color="#00f3ff">Developed 5,000 SKUs</font> = various kind of living creature, excluding insects, in Amazon (we meant the rainforest….)
<font color="#00f3ff">Reciprocated 15,000,000 pcs utensil</font> = 1/4 length of the Great Wall of China (we will build the Great Utensil Wall in this Dynasty of Kool)
<font color="#00f3ff">Presented 20,000,000 pcs tumbler</font> = 20,547 years of water intake for you (maybe in the future we can live that long)
<font color="#00f3ff">And…. uncountable work and dreams still go on</font> = potential power of Kool (damn right we have infinite strength)

hotspot.title: The kool club
hotspot.description: We are not machine, we cannot work 24/7. A work-life balance is vital to our business success, hence all of the entertainment facilities including gym, arcade game, karaoke, snooker table, dart board, massage chair, etc. are open to our kool members at all time!

hotspot.title: Multifunctional table
hotspot.description: At work this is used as a casual meeting venue where open discussion is encouraged to generate creative idea. At party this is used as a games table where we invite all our partners, clients, suppliers, co-workers to enjoy a few rounds of fun drinking game. And the best part is we can remove the top cover and the base is a professional snooker table!
